content: agent1: implementing click.edit() lock_files feature. Will modify src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function). Let me know if you're touching these files too.

agent1: my plan for _termui_impl.py Editor: add lock_files: bool = False param to __init__ (last param), store self.lock_files; add methods _get_lock_filename, _create_lock_file, _remove_lock_file, and a contextlib.contextmanager _locked(filename) used to wrap the subprocess.Popen call inside edit_file(). termui.py: add lock_files: bool = False as new last param to edit(), pass through to Editor(...). I'll implement now - if you're also editing Editor.__init__ signature/edit_file, let's each add our own kwarg as an additional param (mine named lock_files) so we don't collide on the same lines. I'll ping when done.

agent1: done implementing lock_files feature (Editor.__init__ +lock_files param, _get_lock_filename/_create_lock_file/_remove_lock_file, _lock_context contextmanager wrapping the Popen call in edit_file(); termui.edit() +lock_files param passthrough). Wrote patch.txt. Tests pass (tests/test_termui.py, 62 passed). Note: my working copy doesn't show your escape_shell edits yet (git diff only shows mine) - looks like we may be in separate working trees, so no actual file clobbering happened on my end.
